primary_composite.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 2: Americas HR 0.82, 95% CI 0.69-0.98); AACT NCT00094302 outcome_id=211249231 confirms full-trial pooled HR 0.89 [0.77-1.04] as sanity anchor

acm.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 3: Americas ACM HR 0.83, 95% CI 0.68-1.01); AACT NCT00094302 outcome_id=211249235 confirms full-trial pooled ACM HR 0.91 [0.77-1.08] — regional value from Pfeffer 2015 preferred here

cv_death.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 3: Americas CV death HR 0.88, 95% CI 0.71-1.10); AACT NCT00094302 outcome_id=211249232 confirms full-trial pooled CV mortality HR 0.90 [0.73-1.12] as sanity anchor

non_cv_death.source: Derived from ACM conservation (ACM=0.83; CV fraction=0.60; non-CV HR approx 0.755; CI approximate); AACT does not separately report non-CV death; Pfeffer 2015 PMID:25552772 does not provide Americas-specific non-CV death CI

hf_hosp.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 3: Americas HF hosp HR 0.82, 95% CI 0.66-1.01); AACT NCT00094302 outcome_id=211249234 confirms full-trial pooled HF hosp HR 0.83 [0.69-0.99] — consistent

sudden_death.source: AACT NCT00094302 outcome_id=211249239 analysis_id=105516863 (Composite of Sudden Death or Aborted Cardiac Arrest HR 0.96, 95% CI 0.67-1.38, p=0.82; Log Rank; full-trial pooled — Americas-specific value not in AACT; regional split only in PMID:25552772 supplementary)

mi.source: AACT NCT00094302 outcome_id=211249242 analysis_id=105516866 (Myocardial Infarction HR 1.00, 95% CI 0.71-1.42, p=0.98; Log Rank; full-trial pooled — Americas-specific value not in AACT)

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: typical MRA effect +0.2 mmol/L; no Americas-specific subgroup table available in PMID:25552772; AACT NCT00094302 baseline_measurements does not report serum potassium)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: modest SBP reduction in HFpEF population; no Americas-specific value in PMID:25552772; AACT NCT00094302 baseline_measurements does not report SBP change)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: modest acute eGFR dip with MRA in HFpEF; no Americas-specific value in PMID:25552772; AACT NCT00094302 baseline_measurements does not report delta-eGFR)
